hero.desc: Results-driven Software Engineer with nearly 5 years of experience crafting scalable web applications and leading cross-functional teams. Passionate about FinTech, AI, and empowering the next generation of developers.
about.label: // about me
about.title: Building software that makes an impact
about.p1: I'm a Software Engineer based in Cameroon with nearly 5 years of experience crafting high-quality web and cross-platform applications. I thrive at the intersection of technical excellence and real business value.
about.p2: At PKFokam Research Center, I lead cross-functional teams building a Core Banking System on event-driven architecture — Java 21, Spring Boot 3, NestJS, RabbitMQ, and Axon Server. I also wear the Scrum Master hat, keeping delivery aligned with business goals.
about.p3: Beyond engineering, I lecture at PKFokam Institute and previously trained 50+ young women in STEM through the Girl Up program — because great technology needs great people behind it.
skills.label: // technical skills
skills.title: Tools & Technologies
skills.desc: Technologies I use to build reliable, scalable, maintainable software across the full stack.
exp.label: // work experience
exp.title: Career Journey
exp.desc: Nearly 5 years of building, leading, and shipping impactful software solutions across industries.
exp.role1: Backend Developer · Tech Lead · Business Analyst
exp.role1.b1: Built and maintained CBS backend with Java 17 & 21, Spring Boot 3, NestJS, RabbitMQ, Axon Server, and WebSockets
exp.role1.b2: Led cross-functional team (Backend, Frontend, QA, BA) — managing code reviews, task delegation, and technical standards
exp.role1.b3: Converted business needs into user stories, acceptance criteria, and process flows with stakeholders
exp.role1.b4: Ran Agile ceremonies as Scrum Master, aligning sprint delivery with business goals
exp.role1.b5: Supported QA automation — implemented API and frontend E2E tests with Cypress
exp.role2.b1: Designed and delivered lectures and tutorials to undergraduate computer science students
exp.role2.b2: Guided students through practical projects, encouraging problem-solving and critical thinking
exp.role2.b3: Mentored students in academic and professional development
exp.role2.b4: Contributed to curriculum development and continuous improvement of teaching methods
exp.role3.b1: Designed, developed, and maintained interactive websites tailored to client specifications
exp.role3.b2: Created visually appealing UIs with optimized performance, reducing load times significantly
exp.role3.b3: Delivered multiple client projects — resulting in a 20% increase in user engagement
exp.role3.b4: Participated in Agile workflows, conducting code reviews and thorough cross-browser testing
exp.role4.b1: Taught coding fundamentals to young women, promoting STEM education and digital inclusion
exp.role4.b2: Designed and delivered hands-on workshops covering web development and problem-solving
exp.role4.b3: Impacted 50+ participants through structured, project-based learning programs
exp.role5.b1: Deployed and configured Microsoft Office 365 for seamless cloud-based collaboration
exp.role5.b2: Implemented Dahua access control systems and managed hardware/software infrastructure
exp.role5.b3: Reduced operational downtime by 15% through infrastructure optimization
exp.role5.b4: Conducted user training sessions on Office 365 tools and IT security best practices
exp.role6.b1: Researched feasibility of implementing AI systems for banking operations
exp.role6.b2: Delivered a comprehensive AI implementation report used as reference for future technology adoption
exp.role6.b3: Assisted in troubleshooting and optimizing internal applications

proj.label: // featured projects
proj.title: Things I've Built
proj.desc: A selection of projects spanning FinTech, healthcare, education, and enterprise systems. Project images coming soon.
proj.p1.title: Core Banking System (CBS)
proj.p1.desc: Event-driven banking platform with CQRS architecture, real-time transactions, and multi-tenant account management.
proj.p2.title: Healthcare Management Platform
proj.p2.desc: Full-stack patient management system with appointment scheduling, medical records, and real-time notifications via WebSockets.
proj.p3.title: AI-Powered Analytics Dashboard
proj.p3.desc: Intelligent business analytics platform with ML-driven insights, predictive modeling, and interactive data visualizations.
proj.p4.title: E-Learning Platform
proj.p4.desc: Interactive LMS with video courses, progress tracking, quizzes, and live student-instructor collaboration tools.
proj.p5.title: Mobile Banking App
proj.p5.desc: Cross-platform mobile banking application with biometric auth, real-time fund transfers, and transaction history.
proj.p6.title: STEM Workshop Platform
proj.p6.desc: Digital platform for Girl Up STEM workshops with coding exercises, project submissions, and mentorship matching for young women.
proj.p7.title: SARA by Afriland First Bank
proj.p7.desc: Internet banking and payment hub for Afriland First Bank — account access, transfers, bill and tax payments, and a mobile wallet. Deployed across three countries, with internet banking live in one.
